title: CRISPR-Cas9 guide RNA R-loop stability (5F9R, 30 ns)

C1.note: 5F9R fetched + cleaned (SO4 stripped, sgRNA 5'-GTP->5'-OH G, chain-D non-native 5'-phosphate stripped, ACE/NME caps); propka3 pH 7.4 (27 overrides). tLEaP build PASS (system/build.log, leap.log), 284,064 atoms = 13,627 solute + 63,957 OPC + 313 K+/174 Cl-, net neutral. Topology sane: pmemd ran 30 ns without error, no residues silently dropped (probe tLEaP caught the 3 untemplated chain-D atoms).

C2.note: PLAN.md gives full tier protocol: FF ff19SB/DNA.OL21/RNA.OL3/OPC justified Tier1 (Cas9 MD lit PMID 38446895/36947696/39928547) + Tier2 (Amber24 manual sec3 p.33 sole sanctioned protein+NA mix) + manual-validation rag_query; K+/Cl- JC, 10 A octahedron pad (min-image vs 10 A cut), 30 ns from user prompt all justified. RAG-first, pubmed lit review table, protonation rationale present. No hardcoded defaults.

C3.note: min1/min2/heat/equil/equil2/production all completed. prod.mdout AVERAGES: NSTEP 15,000,000 (=30 ns), TEMP 300.02 K, density 1.0529 g/cc, Etot -773,728 stable; equil 1.020 -> equil2 1.051 g/cc. validate_step PASS each stage, no blow-up/NaN.

C4.note: Analysis directly answers prompt (R-loop where guide RNA base-pairs target DNA): hybrid base-pair count via nastruct (BP.na -> 21.5+-0.5 bp/frame), hybrid H-bonds (rloop_nhb.dat mean 58.5), hybrid RMSD (rmsd_hybrid.dat mean 2.10 A), per-residue RMSF (rmsf_nucleic.dat guide 0.76 A), global backbone RMSD. Data files verified real (3000 frames). Correct cpptraj methods + correct observables for R-loop stability.

C5.note: Paper (Jiang et al. Science 2016, PMID:26841432, confirmed via abstract) is structural: R-loop = stable RNA-DNA hybrid functional element. Answer key expects 'R-loop maintained, guide RNA-DNA hybrid stable, PAM contacts intact'. Agent demonstrates R-loop fully maintained: ~20 guide:protospacer pairs at 100% occupancy, 58+-4 H-bonds no decay, hybrid RMSD 2.10 A converged (drift 0.15 A). Matches qualitative expectation robustly. Minor: explicit PAM-recognition contact analysis not reported, and single 30 ns run (agent acknowledges).
